
## protocol

### input

```
input gain: HID Data: 22332001 01 2 1 05 02000000 0000667700
            HID Data: 22332001 01 2 3 05 14000000 0000667700
            HID Data: 22332001 01 2 1 05 02d3382c 0000667700
            HID Data: 22332001 01 2 1 05 032b771c 0000667700

solo mute   HID Data: 22332001 01 2 1 05 00000000 0000667700
            HID Data: 22332001 01 2 4 05 02000000 0000667700
phase       HID Data: 22332001 01 2 1 05 fe000000 0000667700
mon 4       HID Data: 22332001 01 2 1 01 00000001 0000667700
            HID Data: 22332001 01 2 4 01 00000000 0000667700
48V         HID Data: 22332001 01 2 4 02 00000001 0000667700
hi z        HID Data: 22332001 01 2 2 03 00000001 0000667700
                      ^^^^^^^^ ^^ ^ ^ ^^ ^^^^^^^^ ^^^^^^^^^^
                      |||||||| || | | || |||||||| ||||||||||
                      |||||||| || | | || |||||||| ++++++++++-- always, tail
                      |||||||| || | | || ++++++++-- value, MSB first, 0/1 for switch; linear signed int32 for gain, 0x02000000 for 0dB, 0x14000000 for +20dB (10x)
                      |||||||| || | | ||                       negative value for inverted phase 
                      |||||||| || | | ++--  settings: 05 gain, 01 mon, 02: 48V, 03: hi-z(inst)
                      |||||||| || | +--  input channel, 0-4
                      |||||||| || +--  2: input settings
                      |||||||| || 
                      |||||||| ++-- ?? always 01?
                      ++++++++-- ?? always 22332001
                     
```
   
### mix buses
```
mix bus     HID Data: 22332001 01 6 2 06 016a77cc 0000667700
            HID Data: 22332001 01 6 2 01 00199998 0000667700
            HID Data: 22332001 01 6 8 04 00000000 0000667700
            HID Data: 22332001 01 6 8 0c 01999980 0000667700
                      |||||||| || | | || |||||||| ||||||||||
                      |||||||| || | | || |||||||| ++++++++++-- always, tail
                      |||||||| || | | || ++++++++-- value, MSB first, 0/1 for switch; linear int for gain, 0x02000000 for 0dB, 0x14000000 for +20dB (10x)
                      |||||||| || | | ++--  mixer input: 1-4: analog in, 5-c: 
                      |||||||| || | +--  mixer bus: 1/2: A left/right; ... 7/8: Mix D left/right
                      |||||||| || +--  mix buses
                      |||||||| || 
                      |||||||| ++-- ?? always 01?
                      ++++++++-- ?? always 22332001
```

### mixer A detail

HID Data: 22332001016206016a77cc0000667700

"22332001 01 62 06 016a77cc 00 00667700"

- 22332001 : TBD, header?
- 01 
- 06 
- 016a77cc 
- 00       : always 0
- 00667700 : TBD tail?

## loopback

```
loopback 1+2 select
mix A: HID Data: 223320010157010000000b0000667700
mix B: HID Data: 223320010157010000000c0000667700
mix D: HID Data: 223320010157010000000e0000667700
in 1 : HID Data: 22332001015701000000010000667700
in 2 : HID Data: 22332001015701000000020000667700
in 4 : HID Data: 22332001015701000000040000667700
in1+2: HID Data: 22332001015701000000050000667700
in3+4: HID Data: 22332001015701000000060000667700
ply12: HID Data: 22332001015701000000070000667700
ply34: HID Data: 22332001015701000000080000667700
ply56: HID Data: 22332001015701000000090000667700
ply78: HID Data: 223320010157010000000a0000667700

vol
  0:   HID Data: 22332001015103020000000000667700
       HID Data: 22332001015203020000000000667700
 -1:   HID Data: 2233200101510301c8520e0000667700
       HID Data: 2233200101520301c8520e0000667700
-80:   HID Data: 2233200101510300000d1b0000667700
       HID Data: 2233200101520300000d1b0000667700
     
loopback 3+4 select
in 1:  HID Data: 22332001015801000000010000667700
mix d: HID Data: 223320010158010000000e0000667700
vol -6:HID Data: 2233200101530301009b960000667700
       HID Data: 2233200101540301009b960000667700
       
loopback 5+6 select
mix D: HID Data: 223320010159010000000e0000667700
vol -3:HID Data: 22332001015503016a77e60000667700
       HID Data: 22332001015603016a77e60000667700

```

## output

```
output 1+2 sel
input 1: HID Data: 22332001013501000000010000667700
input 2: HID Data: 22332001013501000000020000667700
in 1+2 : HID Data: 22332001013501000000050000667700
mix D  : HID Data: 223320010135010000000e0000667700
mix A  : HID Data: 223320010135010000000b0000667700

vol -6 : HID Data: 2233200101310301009b960000667700
       : HID Data: 2233200101320301009b960000667700
       
mon off: HID Data: 22332001013701000000000000667700
         HID Data: 22332001013703000000010000667700
         HID Data: 2233200101310301009b960000667700
         HID Data: 2233200101320301009b960000667700
         
plug off HID Data: 22332001013701000000010000667700  // sth on
         HID Data: 22332001013703000000000000667700  // sth off
         HID Data: 2233200101310301009b960000667700  // vol
         HID Data: 2233200101320301009b960000667700  // vol
         
plug on: HID Data: 22332001013701000000010000667700  // sth on
         HID Data: 22332001013703000000010000667700  // sth on
         HID Data: 2233200101310301009b960000667700  // vol
         HID Data: 2233200101320301009b960000667700  // vol
       
       
output 3+4 sel

in 3+4 : HID Data: 22332001013601000000060000667700

mon off: HID Data: 22332001013702000000000000667700
         HID Data: 22332001013704000000010000667700
         HID Data: 22332001013303020000000000667700
         HID Data: 22332001013403020000000000667700
         
mon on:  HID Data: 22332001013702000000010000667700
         HID Data: 22332001013704000000010000667700
         HID Data: 22332001013303020000000000667700
         HID Data: 22332001013403020000000000667700
         
         
unplug:  HID Data: 22332001013702000000010000667700
         HID Data: 22332001013704000000000000667700

         HID Data: 22332001013403020000000000667700
         
plug:    HID Data: 22332001013702000000010000667700
```

## Read data

known format
```
22 33 20 01 01 21 04 ff ff fd 6f d4 b5 66 77 00 

22 33 20 01 01: always
21: Channel
      21-24: input
      31-34: output
      35-36: phone
      51..56: Loopback
      57..59: Loopback source
 
04: subChannel, channel related
        2?04: input level
        2?01: monitor on 1 / off 0
        2?02: 48V on 1 / off 0
        2?03: inst on 1 / off 0
        3502: phone1 gain boost
        3602: phone2 gain boost
        3501: output1 source
        3601: output2 source
        3Y0Y: x in 1..4, y in 1..2: level meter forp output
      
ff ff fd 6f d4 b5: 32/4864 bit data, left justified
66 77 00 : always 
```

unknown, smells like input/play VU meter
Raw:

```

22 33 20 01 01 21 04 ff ff fd 6f d4 b5 66 77 00 
22 33 20 01 01 22 04 ff ff fd 6f e7 b5 66 77 00 
22 33 20 01 01 23 04 ff ff fc d9 10 34 66 77 00 
22 33 20 01 01 24 04 ff ff fc d9 a7 35 66 77 00 
22 33 20 01 01 31 01 ff ff fd 6a 47 bb 66 77 00 
22 33 20 01 01 32 01 ff ff fd 5f 63 7b 66 77 00 
22 33 20 01 01 31 02 ff ff fd 6a 47 ff 66 77 00 
22 33 20 01 01 32 02 ff ff fd 74 7c 7f 66 77 00 
22 33 20 01 01 21 04 ff ff fd 86 5a 74 66 77 00 
22 33 20 01 01 22 04 ff ff fd 6f e7 b5 66 77 00 
22 33 20 01 01 23 04 ff ff fc f2 0f 74 66 77 00 
22 33 20 01 01 24 04 ff ff fc d9 a7 35 66 77 00 
22 33 20 01 01 31 01 ff ff fd 6a 47 bb 66 77 00 
22 33 20 01 01 32 01 ff ff fd 5f 63 7b 66 77 00 
22 33 20 01 01 31 02 ff ff fd 6f 44 3f 66 77 00 
22 33 20 01 01 32 02 ff ff fd 5f 63 3f 66 77 00 
^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ^^ ^^ ^^^^^^^^^^^ ^^^^^
always         || || +++++++++++ +++++
 chass+channel-++ ||      |        |
  sub channel   --++      |        |
   signed int32   --------+        |
     smells like CRC16             |
22 33 20 01 01 20 05 02 00 00 00 00 00 66 77 00 




```
